title: narcissus tazetta var. lacticolor
intro: Narcissus tazetta var. lacticolor, also known as the white split jonquil, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to act as a diuretic, antispasmodic, and expectorant, due to the presence of alkaloids such as galantamine and homocholine. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta var. lacticolor include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cognitive function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions, to create remedies for respiratory issues and other health conditions.
